judgment.summary: Alibaba shows strong earnings growth and a low forward P/E, but faces challenges with negative operating margins and free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 89.2%; next earnings date is 2026-05-13.
positives: Quarterly earnings growth of 103.4% YoY indicates a significant turnaround.
Forward P/E of 14.19x is attractive given the growth estimates.
PEG ratio of 0.46 suggests the stock is undervalued relative to its earnings growth.
Total cash of $316.89B provides substantial liquidity.
Consensus rating is strong buy from 40 analysts with a mean target of $191.07.
negatives: Operating margin of -0.3% indicates core operations are not profitable.
Free cash flow (TTM) is negative at $-46.51B, suggesting cash burn.
Revenue growth of 2.9% YoY is modest.
Last quarter's EPS significantly missed estimates by 89.2%.

news.paragraph: Alibaba Group Holding Limited (BABA) is seeing positive analyst sentiment with Benchmark reaffirming a buy rating following AI cloud expansion. Additionally, notable investor Michael Burry has opened a new position in the stock. These developments come amidst broader market news concerning AI advancements from Apple and NVIDIA, though they do not directly impact BABA's core business. The next earnings date is May 13th.

headlines.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL) Targets $15B Service Revenue via AI
NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Gains Momentum on H200 China Clearance
Alibaba Group Holding Limited (BABA): Michael Burry Opens New Position
Benchmark Reaffirms Buy Rating on Alibaba (BABA) Following AI Cloud Expansion
